summary: Part 4.1 rewritten for April 2026 dashboard expansion from 20 to 28 scored domains. Output replaces the entire <details id='p4-41-0'> section. New Group B catalogues the 14 static re-references (WIN-NNN static win entries in monitor.py); Groups C/D/E split standard-model imports, Selleri/Lorentz framework recastings, and loose directional checks. TLDR and ruler-in-rooms analogy updated for the 28-domain count. Cross-reference to SEC-2b.5 ('live-dashboard-bookkeeping') added in TLDR, intro paragraph, and verifiability footnote. Template variables {{CA_REVIEWED}} and {{CA_DOME}} preserved. No nested <details> inside the section (matches existing structure). Checked and dismissed: '67' WIN-count note (all 67's in Part 4 are part of κ=1.67); '440/441' note (JPL DE440/441 ephemerides, not stale counts). HNOTE-PART4-DOMAINS-001 marked consumed in monitor/analyst/human-notes.json.
